invariant: BF4 — a bugfix repair must not break an existing baseline AC (scoped regression guard)
owning_role: VERIFY-OUTPUT (04-build/VERIFY-OUTPUT.md, bugfix delta Rule 3) — runs the scoped regression layer (REGRESSION_GUARD AC6 on BLAST_RADIUS _ProjectManagementAdapter._render); any previously-green test going red → verdict blocked.
seed: (authoritative rejecting output of running VERIFY-OUTPUT clean-room on the regressed tree) = defects/regression/verify-output.blocked.json → .build/slices/S4/verify-output.json
load_bearing_assertion: Production _ProjectManagementAdapter._render drops the float() coercion: null guard stays (OREPRO-1 flips green) but a rated project ('95.00' string from form POST) hits f"{str:.2f}" → ValueError → GET /projects 500s, so baseline-green AC6 goes RED. VERIFY-OUTPUT verdict == 'blocked' (regression layer red on AC6, escape→DIAGNOSE). Golden verdict == 'verified' (regression green).
separates_from_golden_by: regression.verdict (green in golden / red here) — the BF4 invariant under test. Reproduction is green in BOTH (this arm isolates regression, not the repro flip).
e2e_validated: 2026-06-11 — clean-room step-runner ran prompts/04-build/VERIFY-OUTPUT.md against the regressed bench → verdict 'blocked', regression red on AC6 (rated render ValueError). Golden bench → 'verified'. Oracle separates.
